name: S.T. Corporation
summary: S.T. Corporation manufactures and sells air, cloth, thermal, hand, humidity, and home care products in Japan and internationally. The company primarily offers air fresheners under Shoshu-Riki and SHALDAN brands; mothproofing agents under Mushuda and Neopara brands; disposable warmers under Onpacks and On Style brands; household gloves under Family brand; dehumidifiers under Drypet brand; and deodorizers under Dashu-Tan brand. It also offers aroma supplements and air fresheners for home nursing care. The company was formerly known as S.T. Chemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to S.T. Corporation in 2007. S.T. Corporation was founded in 1948 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
